feedback.text: I would like to see an end to the destruction of digital property such as when a service provider ends acsess to a piece of media ir software on their platform sold as a one time purchase perpetual service with no given end date, without providing an option to acsess said media ir software through other means like a option to download it before ending the life of the given perpetual service and removal of drm that would render the software unusable and perhaps a option to self host the service if that is a requirement that would require an end of life plan for software requiering drm or servers to acsess core functionality.
